failures.description: The catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the required count of available Mechanical Keyboard products.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch tool call with well-formed arguments. The tool explicitly returned an infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, with message that the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a schema or malformed invocation issue, and the later steps do not resolve it; they only report that the task could not be completed.
